misc.title: #ONEPIECE1188 IMU PROBABLY ATE THE FOREST GOD FRUIT! I suspect that Oda is indirectly hinting that Imu ate the Forest God fruit, the deity that, according to the mural, sent forth the demons. Just loo
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1188 IMU PROBABLY ATE THE FOREST GOD FRUIT! I suspect that Oda is indirectly hinting that Imu ate the Forest God fruit, the deity that, according to the mural, sent forth the demons. Just look at what happens when Imu appears: he manipulates the trees and the houses (which are made of wood from those trees), causing them to come alive, yet the ground and other materials remain unchanged. When he flies away, the trees and houses return to normal. Furthermore, in this chapter, he is able to drain the life force from the trees and absorb it for himself... Oda is hinting that the fruit Imu possesses is the Forest God fruit. The signs are unmistakable, just keep an eye out for them.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1188 The scene where Imu drains the life from the trees really reminds me of the scene where Zeref did something similar with his Black Magic in Fairy Tail.
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1188 The scene where Imu drains the life from the trees really reminds me of the scene where Zeref did something similar with his Black Magic in Fairy Tail.

misc.text: Greenwood transferi için hakkı teslim etmek gerekir. Bize yakışan Fenerbahçe’nin menfaatine olanı tebrik etmek, aleyhine yapılanı eleştirmektir. Greenwood transferi için çabalayan Aziz Yıldırım ve transfer sürecinde rol alan yöneticilerimize teşekkür ederiz. Yolun sonu şampiyonluk olsun.

misc.title: 🚨 SON DAKİKA | ÖZEL HABER Mason Greenwood resmen Fenerbahçe’de! 🟡🔵 Fenerbahçe, yıldız oyuncuyu 39.5 milyon euro bonservis bedeliyle kadrosuna kattı. Anlaşmada 5 milyon euro şampiyonluk bonusu da ye
misc.text: 🚨 SON DAKİKA | ÖZEL HABER Mason Greenwood resmen Fenerbahçe’de! 🟡🔵 Fenerbahçe, yıldız oyuncuyu 39.5 milyon euro bonservis bedeliyle kadrosuna kattı. Anlaşmada 5 milyon euro şampiyonluk bonusu da yer alıyor. Greenwood’un yıllık maaşı ise 10 milyon euro olacak. Fenerbahçe tarihinin en önemli transferlerinden biri resmiyet kazandı.
